title: EGFDU, ANCC, ASTNL, ASTNU, EGFDL, BUDA and Geology ?
content: Can you confirm that EGFDU, ANCC, ASTNL, ASTNU, EGFDL, BUDA and Geology in typewell are available in the hidden test set ?

comments.content:
No, they are not. They are only available in the train data. As said on the data page here

ANCC, ASTNU, ASTNL, EGFDU, EGFDL, BUDA - Predicted depth of various geological formations (Training only).
